title: Panel
description:
Panel: 2D element for structural analysis. 
The Panel is a planar surface object defined by a list of planar 'Edges' (curves with properties) for both external and internal edges (openings).

ExternalEdges.description: A list of coplanar Edges defining the external contour and potential constraints of the Panel.

Openings.description: A list of Openings of the panel. The edges that make up the openings must be coplanar with the external edges.

OrientationAngle.description:
Defines the angle that the local x and y axes are rotated around the normal (i.e. local z) of the Panel.
The normal of the Panel is determined by the right hand curl rule dictated by the order of the edge list.
Local x is found by projecting the global X to the plane of the Panel and is then rotated with the OrientationAngle, except for the case when the Normal is parallel with the global X. For this case the local y is instead found by projecting global Y to the plane of the Panel and is then rotated with the OrientationAngle.
The remaining local axis is determined by the right hand rule. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
